description: Initial knowledge slice declarations (KP-03). Deliberately small: one role/phase-specific slice and one wildcard default. Extend as pinned needs surface from delivered/used telemetry (KP-05).

slices.description: Implementers doing execution-phase work always get the working philosophy up front, and never see unreviewed auto-distilled placeholders that would crowd the budget with low-signal text.

Wildcard default applied to every task: auto-distilled evolution notes are placeholder-prone (many still contain 'None extracted automatically (policy fallback)') and pollute retrieval ranking, so they are excluded corpus-wide. Curated evolution docs (biometric_privacy.md, reconstruction-learnings-*, wisdom_*) are NOT matched by the distill_ glob and remain searchable.
